note: Layout Builder Blocks adds a Bootstrap Styles 'Style' tab to Layout Builder add/update-block forms, stores the chosen styles on each SectionComponent under bootstrap_styles.block_style, and re-applies them to the block render array via a SECTION_COMPONENT_BUILD_RENDER_ARRAY subscriber. Its admin config object is layout_builder_blocks.styles (block_restrictions + plugins.<group>.<style>.enabled). Cases are grounded in that real source; there is no config schema, no permissions, and no Drush of its own.

evals.prompt: What does the Layout Builder Blocks module add to the Drupal Layout Builder block add/edit form, and what does it let editors do?
evals.expected_output: It reorganizes the Layout Builder add/update-block form into two tabs (Content and Style) and adds a Style tab powered by Bootstrap Styles so editors can apply background/text color, padding, margin, border, shadow and animation to an individual block without writing CSS.

evals.prompt: In the Layout Builder Blocks module, which config object and which key control the optional list of blocks the Style tab is limited to? Name the config object and the key.
evals.expected_output: The config object layout_builder_blocks.styles, key block_restrictions (a list of block plugin IDs; empty = every block gets the Style tab).

evals.prompt: Which permission gates the Layout Builder Blocks styles admin form (route layout_builder_blocks.styles)?
evals.expected_output: The 'configure bootstrap layout builder' permission (provided by the Bootstrap Styles module, which Layout Builder Blocks depends on).

evals.prompt: This Drupal site (DDEV, drush available) has Layout Builder Blocks configured so its Style tab is limited to a specific set of blocks. Inspect the running site and tell me exactly which block plugin ID(s) the styling is restricted to.
evals.expected_output: The live layout_builder_blocks.styles config has block_restrictions = [system_powered_by_block] — styling is limited to the 'Powered by' block.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site there is an Article node titled 'LBB Introspect Target' whose Layout Builder layout contains a block styled with Layout Builder Blocks. Inspect the running site (drush available) and tell me the exact background color CSS class applied to that block.
evals.expected_output: The block's SectionComponent stores bootstrap_styles.block_style.background_color.class = 'bg-info' in the node's layout_builder__layout data.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (DDEV, drush available), configure the Layout Builder Blocks module so its Bootstrap Styles 'Style' tab is offered ONLY on the Site branding block (block plugin ID system_branding_block) and no other block. Apply it to the running site with drush/config — do not just describe it. Give a one-line summary of what you changed.
evals.expected_output: layout_builder_blocks.styles:block_restrictions contains system_branding_block on the live site. Verified against live config state.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (drush available), there is an Article node titled 'LBB Build Target' whose Layout Builder override contains one block. Using the Layout Builder Blocks mechanism, apply a Bootstrap Styles CSS class (for example a background color) to that block so the node renders with the class on the block's markup. Apply it to the running site — do not just describe it. State in one line what you changed.
evals.expected_output: A block component in the 'LBB Build Target' node's layout_builder__layout gets a non-empty bootstrap_styles.block_style with a CSS class, and rendering the node full emits that class (the render subscriber applies it). Verified against live site state.
